summary: Bind the documented M3 status to exact candidate 1a5b38a: every unblocked hosted implementation gate passes, while the implemented raw parity gate remains red under Q-0034 and Q-0033 remains an explicit owner-policy blocker.

externalInputs.purpose: Bind the exact M3 candidate to the web, native, browser, production-static, installer, lifecycle, and raw parity conclusions.
Confirm the exact-head detector passed and correctly reused the retained WASM artifact because the heavyweight build workflow was unchanged.
Confirm the isolated owner similarity job passed at the exact candidate head without inspecting or executing its harness locally.

decisions.decision: Document 1a5b38a as green for every unblocked hosted implementation gate, including the complete signed Windows lifecycle, while retaining the implemented raw parity gate as red under Q-0034 and the overall M3 status as blocked by Q-0033 and Q-0034. Do not convert the raw SVG line endings, publish quarantined web-engine bytes, or call the red aggregate CI conclusion green.
decisions.rationale: Exact-head evidence now closes the earlier scratch, production-static, AppImage, association, and window-restoration failures. The sole CI failure is the byte-for-byte SVG rule the specification explicitly requires the owner to amend, and public WASM distribution remains an owner-counsel decision. Separating passed implementation evidence from unresolved owner policy keeps the repository accurate without waiving either gate.

testEvidence.criterion: The exact M3 candidate passes every unblocked hosted implementation gate, and the implemented raw parity failure plus remaining owner blocks are identified precisely.
testEvidence.test: Inspect exact-head hosted run metadata and retained step evidence without rerunning or weakening a gate.

red.outcome: RED: earlier candidate e9a0c5e passed all completed platform work except Q-0034 but exposed a one-shot Windows saved-rectangle evidence race.

green.command: gh run view 29557414112 --json headSha,status,conclusion,jobs; gh run view 29557414107 --json headSha,status,conclusion,jobs; gh run view 29557417800 --json headSha,status,conclusion,jobs
green.outcome: PARTIAL: exact head 1a5b38a passed web, native, both browser platforms, production-static, DMG, AppImage, complete signed Windows lifecycle, retained-WASM, and isolated similarity gates. Its only failed job was the implemented raw SVG parity gate under Q-0034: the first difference was native CR versus WASM LF and the length delta was consistent with line endings, while fail-fast comparison left later differences and examples unproven. Q-0033 separately blocks publishing the quarantined bytes.

attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
